eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; Alpine, CA; at 9:35 AM on JUN 5, 2019 Effective until 9:50 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Douglas County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Douglas, Carson City, Storey, Lyon and Alpine Counties.  This is only a test. No action required.
